description_long: This object is an open book with a worn, brown cover and visible signs of aging on its pages, which are yellowed and slightly wrinkled. The book is spread flat, revealing two pages with a central crease and no visible text or illustrations. The edges of the pages are uneven, and the corners of the cover show some wear, suggesting frequent handling or age. The cover appears to be made of a textured material, possibly leather or faux leather, with a faded, speckled pattern. The pages themselves are thick and fibrous, with a matte finish and a muted, off-white to yellowish color. There are no visible embellishments, illustrations, or markings on the pages or cover.
description: An open, aged book with a brown, worn cover and yellowed, blank pages. The book shows signs of wear and has no visible text or illustrations.
description_view_0: The book is open and viewed from the front, showing the central crease and both pages with yellowed, blank surfaces.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top edge, emphasizing the thickness of the pages and the flatness of the open spread.
description_view_2: The book is open and viewed from the back, similar to the front but with the opposite page orientation and visible spine.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the bottom edge, again highlighting the layered, yellowed pages and the flat, open position.
